news.t: Davis ETFs to Transfer Exchange Listing of All Four Funds to CBOE Global Markets, Inc.

holdings.infoBox: DFNL is an equity ETF with a total of 32 individual holdings. The top holdings are Capital One Financial stock at 9.54%, U.S. Bancorp at 6.06%, Fifth Third Bancorp at 5.92%, Markel Group at 5.79%, and Berkshire Hathaway at 5.50%.

overview.description: The Davis Select Financial ETF (DFNL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in financials equity. The fund is an actively-managed portfolio of global financial sector stocks. The fund seeks long-term growth of capital. DFNL was launched on Jan 11, 2017 and is issued by Davis.

data.title: Davis ETFs to Transfer Exchange Listing of All Four Funds to CBOE Global Markets, Inc.
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Davis ETFs are actively managed ETFs with combined assets of over $1.2 billion and were launched in 2017. Davis Selected Advisers, L.P. announced today plans to transfer the...
